calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-04-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Richard Grotch; Clerk Karissa Shaw, Not reported. (525)

APPEARANCES:
Respondent Bruce A. Fodiman is present.
Witnesses on behalf of the Respondent; Christine Troy and Sheila Quinlan are present.
Appellant Anja Freudenthal is present.
Witness on behalf of the Appellant; Abdeladime Dakli is present.

This matter comes on calendar for a trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

The following exhibit is marked and ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE on behalf of the Respondent;
A - "Evidence of oral contract..." (10 pages).

The court hears argument from both sides as to the factual issues of the case. Court and litigants confer on the Respondent's exhibits as well as previously marked exhibits.

The court hears testimony from witness Troy and briefly questions her on key factual issues. The witness is also examined by Appellant Freudenthal. Although offered by the litigants, the court chooses not to hear testimony from the remaining witnesses.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the court takes this matter under submission.

JUDGMENT ENTERED.
